requiredCertSet.notes: ISO 22000 or equivalent FSMS certification required
HACCP plan and certification covering supplied food/agro materials
Third-party certified to ISO 22000:2018; expiry must be > 90 days from today
Signed declaration confirming materials are food-contact compliant
Ink/coating migration test certificate confirming compliance with EU 10/2011 or equivalent
Required only for retail/Rx-labelled outer packs; not mandatory for bulk packaging
Supplier declaration that no animal-derived materials subject to BSE/TSE risk are used
Valid GMP certificate issued by a recognized authority (WHO, USFDA, EMA, PMDA)
Current FDA facility registration or equivalent national regulatory registration
Ingredient must comply with FCC or relevant food-grade standard as applicable
COA for three consecutive commercial batches; must cover all compendial tests
Compliance with ICH Q7 (GMP for APIs) and relevant ICH stability guidelines
Supplier must maintain and provide retention samples per GMP requirements; verified pre-ONBOARDED
